prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical fashion portrait of a confident young woman standing indoors in a warm, softly lit rustic studio. She has long wavy dark brown hair swept over one shoulder, light blue-gray eyes, defined brows, natural glam makeup, and a subtle closed-mouth smile while looking directly at the camera. She wears a vivid cobalt blue satin corset-style blouse with a sweetheart neckline, lace-up front, fitted bodice, and long puff sleeves, paired with a high-waisted pale silver-gray pleated midi skirt. Add exactly 4 visible accessories: large gold hoop earrings, a delicate necklace with a small cross pendant, a thin bracelet, and a glossy cobalt blue structured handbag held by its top handle in her left hand. Pose her in a three-quarter waist-up-to-knees composition, one hand resting near the skirt, relaxed shoulders, elegant posture. Use warm golden rim light from behind and soft key light on her face, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, and a blurred neutral beige-brown interior background with rustic walls, a stool, ceramic decor, and dried grasses. The image should feel like a high-end editorial fashion photograph shot on an 85mm lens, realistic skin texture, rich satin highlights, crisp focus on the subject, vertical 2:3 framing, no text, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic vertical fashion portrait of a confident young woman standing indoors in a warm, softly lit rustic studio. She has long wavy dark brown hair swept over one shoulder, light blue-gray eyes, defined brows, natural glam makeup, and a subtle closed-mouth smile while looking directly at the camera. She wears a vivid cobalt blue satin corset-style blouse with a sweetheart neckline, lace-up front, fitted bodice, and long puff sleeves, paired with a high-waisted pale silver-gray pleated midi skirt. Add exactly 4 visible accessories: large gold hoop earrings, a delicate necklace with a small cross pendant, a thin bracelet, and a glossy cobalt blue structured handbag held by its top handle in her left hand. Pose her in a three-quarter waist-up-to-knees composition, one hand resting near the skirt, relaxed shoulders, elegant posture. Use warm golden rim light from behind and soft key light on her face, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, and a blurred neutral beige-brown interior background with rustic walls, a stool, ceramic decor, and dried grasses. The image should feel like a high-end editorial fashion photograph shot on an 85mm lens, realistic skin texture, rich satin highlights, crisp focus on the subject, vertical 2:3 framing, no text, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张写实风格的竖版时尚人像，画面中是一位自信的年轻女性，站在室内温暖、柔和光线的质朴工作室中。她留着长波浪卷发，发色为 深棕色，头发拨向一侧；有着浅蓝灰色的眼睛、轮廓分明的眉毛、自然精致的妆容，直视镜头时带着淡淡的闭口微笑。她身穿一件鲜艳的钴蓝色缎面紧身胸衣式衬衫，采用心形领口、前系带设计、修身剪裁和长泡泡袖，搭配一条高腰浅银灰色百褶中长裙。添加 4 个清晰可见的配饰：大号金质圆环耳环、带有小十字架吊坠的精致项链、细手链，以及左手提着的一款光泽感钴蓝色结构化手提包。构图采用四分之三腰部到膝盖的景别，一只手放在裙子附近，肩膀放松，姿态优雅。使用来自背后的温暖金色轮廓光和面部的柔和主光，浅景深，奶油般虚化的背景，模糊的米棕色中性室内背景，包含质朴的墙壁、凳子、陶瓷装饰和干草。画面应呈现出由 85mm 镜头拍摄的高端时尚杂志大片质感，皮肤纹理真实，缎面高光丰富，主体对焦清晰，竖版 2:3 构图，无文字，无水印。
